notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Freddy Fermin hits a sacrifice bunt. Fielding error by pitcher Tejay Antone. Jase Bowen to 3rd. Samad Taylor to 2nd. Freddy Fermin to 1st.
